text: Live updates: Iran deal progress is murky after US military says it carried out ‘self-defense’ strikes - AP News
fullText: Iran on Tuesday denounced U.S. strikes a day earlier as talks for a deal to end the war continue. U.S. President Donald Trump had said Monday that negotiations are “proceeding nicely.”

text: Google Health is here, but a lot of people want their Fitbit app back instead - The Verge
fullText: Google Health has officially replaced the Fitbit app, leaving many users frustrated with the new app’s design and Google’s AI health coach.

text: Longview industrial implosion causes fatalities, critical injuries, officials confirm - Oregon Public Broadcasting - OPB
fullText: At least one person is dead and eight people are being treated for injuries after a chemical vat imploded at Southwest Washington paper mill Tuesday morning.

text: An astronaut’s mystery illness could change the way NASA plans future missions - CNN
fullText: A health scare prompted the first ever early return from the International Space Station for a medical reason. Does it change the plan for deep space missions?

text: China Launches Synthetic Human Embryos to Space Station - Futurism
fullText: China sent a batch of synthetic human embryos to its Tiangong space station, in an experiment to explore human reproduction in space.

text: Controversial electric Ferrari outrages transport minister (and the rest of Italy) - politico.eu
fullText: Matteo Salvini joined a chorus of Italians slamming the design of the first fully electric Ferrari.

text: An exceptionally early heat wave shatters records and brings deaths in Europe - NPR
fullText: Temperature records are breaking and triggering government warnings, with London hitting 95 degrees the past two days. Experts say unpredictable and extreme weather is becoming more frequent.

text: South Carolina’s redistricting effort fails in the state Senate amid GOP opposition - NBC News
fullText: The Republican-led South Carolina Senate on Tuesday voted against a measure to advance a new congressional map, ending the redistricting effort in the state for now

text: Trump administration proposes government-wide NDAs - Politico
fullText: It is the Trump administration's latest attempt to crack down on leaks to media organizations.

text: Ebola Outbreak At Risk Of Becoming ‘Deadliest On Record,’ Humanitarian Group Warns (Live Updates) - Forbes
fullText: More than 220 people have died and there's no sign the spread is slowing.

text: Eleven killed in Lebanon village as Israel intensifies strikes - BBC
fullText: Israel says it struck 100 Hezbollah infrastructure sites and fighters in Lebanon, after PM Benjamin Netanyahu vows to "crush" Hezbollah.

text: White House lawn transformed as UFC arena construction begins outside - USA Today
fullText: Construction crews build a temporary arena on the White House South Lawn to host the UFC Freedom 250 fight card set for June in Washington, D.C.

fullText: Here are the companies making headlines in midday trading.

text: U.S.-wanted nephew of notorious cartel boss "El Chapo" is captured in Mexico - CBS News
fullText: The nephew of notorious Mexican drug lord Joaquin "El Chapo" Guzman is sought by U.S. authorities, officials said.

text: Micron Stock Hits $1 Trillion. Trump and Wall Street Unite Behind the Chip Titan. - Barron's
fullText: Micron stock is rising sharply after President Donald Trump praised the memory-chip company’s investment plans.

text: American Airlines picks SpaceX's Starlink for in-flight Wi-Fi on more than 500 planes - CNBC
fullText: American Airlines said it will install SpaceX's Starlink for inflight Wi-Fi on more than 500 of its airplanes.
